one_time_description: Treaty loan forgiveness recognized as revenue
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprises including forestry, aggregates, contracting, wilderness resort, property management. COVID-19 impacts noted as ongoing uncertainty.
notes: Audit is qualified for three reasons: (1) Cheslatta Community Trust not consolidated - had this been included assets and annual surplus would have increased by approx $101 million; (2) Government Business Enterprises not prepared under IFRS as required; (3) Opening tangible capital asset listing not provided so existence and valuation could not be verified. Comparative 2019 figures restated per Note 12. Nation controls 18 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. total_government_transfers includes ISC $1,072,091 + FNHA $10,282 + Province of BC $1,690,000 + PGNAETA $50,270 + FNESC $18,111 + CSFS $109,876 = $2,950,630 but Province of BC may include some non-transfer amounts; used ISC + FNHA + Prov BC + PGNAETA + FNESC + CSFS = 2950630 for government transfers. osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
